demographic_audit_note: Audit of Atlantis record for Arthur Vance (86M) revealed a zip code mismatch (19143 vs 19104) on the facility face sheet. Medicare Straight verified as primary; address corrected to ensure MA travel radius is accurate.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker (SW) confirmed the goal is Home with 24/7 family supervision and HHA support; LTC transition was discussed but ruled out by POA (daughter).
stage_1_intake_responses: Q1: 'No, I haven't heard of you.' Q2: 'I think you're here to help me walk.' Q3: 'The social worker said a nurse would come to the house.' Q4: 'I am terrified of falling again when my daughter is at work.' (Anxiety regarding fall history escalated to SW for PT home safety priority).
weekly_facility_update: Week 2 Check-in: Patient cognitively fluctuated but cleared by PT for ambulation with a walker. SW target discharge is Friday. Daughter (POA) confirmed home modifications (grab bars) are complete.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into daughter's phone during bedside meeting; program flyer delivered to patient and taped to discharge folder.
hha_confirmation_status: Not In Place as of Wednesday due to HHA Staffing Shortage in the 19143 zip code. PN performed a Deep Dive and found the HHA intake coordinator had the referral but no nurse was available for a Friday admission. Escalated to SW for alternative agency search. Status updated to 'In Place' on Thursday at 3:45 PM after SW secured coverage and HHA confirmed RN 'Sarah' with a 10:00 AM Friday window.
stage_3_followup_audit: Call 1 (to SW): Confirmed Friday 11:00 AM D/C is firm and HHA has assigned a nurse. Call 2 (to daughter): Confirmed daughter understands RN Sarah arrives between 10 AM - 12 PM and MA will follow in the afternoon.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Reached daughter via phone 24 hours prior to D/C. Home readiness confirmed; daughter expressed relief that a specific nurse name was provided. No new clinical setbacks reported.
atlantis_final_sync: D/C date (Friday) and 1st visit date (Friday) entered into Atlantis; HHA agency name and assigned nurse 'Sarah' logged in the coordination notes.
ma_visit_booking: MA visit successfully scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM. Booking was delayed until Thursday evening to ensure the HHA-First Rule was satisfied and a nurse was assigned.
narrative_summary: Arthur Vance (86M, Dementia) was successfully transitioned home following a hip fracture and fall-related hospitalization. During the ENTRY/TRIAGE phase, the Connection Intake revealed significant fall anxiety, which prompted a PN escalation to the SW for an urgent home safety evaluation. Despite a critical HHA Staffing Shortage that threatened to delay discharge, the PN maintained the Confidence Loop by performing a deep-dive barrier check and only scheduling the MA once the HHA was confirmed 'In Place' during the HANDOFF stage.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis Data Lag: Face sheet zip code (19143) contradicts Atlantis record (19104).
format_1_state_log.ai_assumed_bottleneck: Administrative data mismatch prevents HHA from verifying service territory.

format_1_state_log.event_description: HHA Staffing Shortage: Agency reports no RN coverage for the specific rural zip code.
format_1_state_log.ai_assumed_bottleneck: Operational shortage in specialized geriatric care nursing.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Pre-DC Pulse Call: Initial attempt to reach daughter (POA) failed; call disconnected twice.
format_1_state_log.ai_assumed_bottleneck: Operational communication gap 24 hours prior to transition.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient (Arthur) expresses high anxiety about falling again in Connection Intake Q4.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Escalated patient anxiety to the Social Worker to ensure PT orders specifically included a home safety assessment.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA intake coordinator remains silent regarding the Friday start-of-care date.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Performed a deep-dive call to HHA intake to identify the staffing shortage barrier and informed the SW.

format_2_triples.situation: Daughter (POA) is unsure of what equipment (walker/commode) should be at the home for Day 1.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Conducted the Confidence Audit call to walk the family through the Day 1 plan and equipment list.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Upon learning of the HHA staffing shortage, the PN logs the delay in Atlantis and waits for the Social Worker to find a solution or a new agency.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW's role as the primary finder of agencies while ensuring the delay is documented for the team.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: PN calls the HHA intake coordinator to confirm the specific reason for the delay (Staffing Shortage), then escalates this categorized barrier to the SW with a request to pivot HHAs or negotiate coverage.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Maintains the PN role as a liaison who identifies and categorizes barriers to give the SW actionable data without overstepping into agency selection.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: PN contacts a different HHA agency where they have a personal contact to see if they can staff the case, then provides the SW with the new agency's contact info and tells them to switch the referral.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This oversteps the SW boundary by suggesting/selecting specific agencies and managing the referral process directly.
